summary: Frontend-only testing of SnapRoad UI improvements. All requested features verified working correctly: scrollable car onboarding, challenge modal with close button, 3D car markers without white background, hamburger menu profile with car icon, consistent badge counts.
critical_code_review_comments: CarOnboarding.tsx: 2-step flow working correctly with scrollable content (overflow-y-auto), vehicle type selection (sedan/suv/truck), and color selection
ChallengeModal.tsx: Has close button with data-testid='challenge-close', scrollable content with max-h-[90vh] and overflow-y-auto
InteractiveMap.tsx: 3D car marker uses Car3DMarker component with SVG rendering, NO white background circle - only subtle blue pulse ring
index.tsx: Hamburger menu profile shows ProfileCar component when userCar.category is set, falls back to initials otherwise
Badge count uses badges.filter(b => b.earned).length consistently in both menu (line 999) and rewards tab
test_credentials: No credentials needed - used /api/session/reset to start fresh onboarding
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/session/reset, then completed onboarding via UI (plan selection + car selection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI improvements verified. Car onboarding is 2-step (type then color), both steps scrollable. Challenge modal accessible via Leaderboard. Map has 3D car SVG markers without white circles.

features.rules_section: How it works with 3 bullet points

3d_car_marker_on_map.description: 3D car SVG marker without white background

hamburger_menu_profile.description: Profile shows car icon instead of initials

badge_count_consistency.description: Badge count shows X/160 format consistently

features.pinch_to_zoom: Implemented in code (handleMouseMove with touch events)

features.prompt_text: Hi! I'm Orion. Say something like 'cop on my left' or 'hazard ahead'
features.mic_button: Large blue mic with 'Tap to speak'

mocked_data_note: All backend APIs are mock data as specified in review request
